title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: KEIZER BRANCH HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of sports and fitness programs, including team sports such as basketball and soccer. Snacks, meals, and nutrition education are also provided. 4840 Noren Avenue NE Keizer, OR 97307 Eligibility: Grades 1-12 Hours: Varies Email (503) 304-1313 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 304-1313 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Membership fee is $25 annually. Sport fees varies by program. Financial assistance available. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On Kennedy Elementary School grounds Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
